description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, compact frame and a matte black finish. The slide is smooth with subtle serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and the barrel is short, consistent with a concealed-carry or service pistol. The grip is ergonomically contoured, appearing to be made of a polymer material, and is integrated seamlessly with the frame. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any visible extensions or flares. No visible markings, engravings, or logos are present on the slide or frame, giving the handgun a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a smooth slide, ergonomic polymer grip, and a flush magazine base. The design is minimalist, with no visible markings or embellishments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the smooth slide, contoured grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide serrations, grip contour, and the overall symmetry of the handgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a gentle curve to fit the palm, featuring a smooth, matte polymer surface without visible texturing or checkering. Its shape is slightly flared at the base for improved retention, and there are no finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments present. The grip appears to be integrated seamlessly with the frame, providing a streamlined and modern look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured surface and a gentle undercut where it meets the grip, enhancing comfort and control. There are no squared-off edges, reinforcement ribs, or integrated accessory rails visible.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the slide, consistent with a compact handgun profile. It has a standard, non-threaded muzzle with no visible compensators, ports, or external markings. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no distinctive features or engravings on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and compact profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing visible on the magazine base.
